narrative:
Rittman TWP township has 96 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 44.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.1 percentage points.
